evals.prompt: Scan this repo and give me a quick overview of its size and structure.
evals.expected_output: A .archeia/codebase/scan-report.md file with LOC counts, token estimates, directory tree, module list, README coverage, dependency counts, test footprint, git vitals, and signals. Should be purely quantitative — no architectural narrative.

evals.prompt: I need to understand how big this codebase is before we start documenting it. Can you scan it?
evals.expected_output: A .archeia/codebase/scan-report.md for the track repo. Should detect it as a multi-file project, count LOC, estimate tokens, and identify modules. The report should help plan documentation effort.

evals.prompt: Run a scan report on this repository so I can see what we're dealing with.
evals.expected_output: A .archeia/codebase/scan-report.md for the track-app repo. Should produce all sections with real measurements. Framework and language should be correctly identified in the summary line.
